title: THE STORY OF THE TEN COMMANDMENTS - DISCOVER HOW THE TEN COMMANDMENTS CAME TO BE
subtitle: Origins of the Law
summary: An overview of the importance and relevance of the Ten Commandments in the Christian life.
transcript: [Transcript placeholder] In this episode we explain how Moses received the Ten Commandments on Mount Sinai, discussing the historical and spiritual context behind the law.

title: Thou shalt have no other Gods before me - A short explanatory video of the first Commandment
subtitle: First Commandment
summary: Explains the meaning of placing God first and avoiding idolatry.
transcript: [Transcript placeholder] This narration explores the first commandment, emphasizing exclusive worship of the one true God and the dangers of idolatry in ancient culture.

title: The Second Commandment: No Graven Images
subtitle: Understanding idolatry
summary: Description of the second commandment and why God forbids idols.
transcript: [Transcript placeholder] In this segment we dive into the prohibition against making images, discussing its implications for worship and how it preserves the transcendence of God.
